
---
title: "Jacob E. Gardner, M.D./M.P.H."                                # Your name
image: img/headshot.jpg
image-alt: "Jacob Gardner headshot"

format:
  html:
    css: styles.css

about:
  template: broadside
  id: about-block

  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jacob-gardner-10930725b/
    - icon: 0-circle
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9692-2979
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:jacgardner@montefiore.org"  
---

## Background

::: {.columns}

::: {.column}

### Education

Case Western Reserve University School of Medicine | Cleveland, OH  
Doctor of Medicine | Jul. 2020 – May 2025  

Case Western Reserve University School of Medicine | Cleveland, OH  
Master of Public Health | Jun. 2023 – May 2024  

Duke University | Durham, NC  
Bachelor of Science – Neuroscience and Philosophy | Aug. 2013 – May 2017  

:::

::: {.column}

### Work Experience

Montefiore Medical Center / Albert Einstein College of Medicine  
Categorical Resident | Jul. 2025 – Present  

Centers for Disease Control and Prevention  
Research Intern | Oct. 2023 – Jun. 2024  

Cleveland Clinic Foundation, Lerner Research Institute  
Clinical Research Coordinator | Apr. 2021 – Aug. 2025  

Calmette Hospital, National Cancer Centre of Cambodia  
Clinical Research Coordinator | Feb. 2018 – Aug. 2025  

:::

:::
